notes.post_text:
Never forget…

The Biden Administration did not let Elon use SpaceX to save astronauts who had been stranded for 9 months before the 2024 election because it could possibly help Trump politically.

Human beings stranded in space.

That’s the Left.
notes.note_text: PolitiFact rated a related claim False. NASA stated the astronauts were delayed due to Starliner safety issues and would return after a SpaceX crew arrived. https://www.politifact.com/factchecks/2025/jan/08/facebook-posts/no-elon-musk-didnt-say-the-boeing-starliner-astron/

notes.note_text: AFP Fact Check rated false the claim that James Talarico is vegan. Talarico has publicly stated he is vegetarian, not vegan, and is not "anti-meat" in the absolute sense implied. https://factcheck.afp.com/doc.afp.com.B4427KG

notes.post_text:
James Talarico wants to make our border a “welcome mat” for illegals—his words! He believes there are 6 genders and wants trans surgeries for kids. 

He’s a far-left radical with no business in the Senate.
notes.note_text: AFP Fact Check rated this Misleading. The clip of Talarico saying the border should be a "welcome mat" was deceptively edited; in full context he was describing what he opposes, not what he supports. https://factcheck.afp.com/doc.afp.com.A23T99E
